3073830.name: RedDrop
3073830.description:
RedDrop is a frantic rhythm game with pixel art style, where you must fight alongside Ren to rescue his sister Aiko. She has been captured by Haka, a former Kyoshi monk corrupted by the malevolent influence of the Reddrop katana, plunging Japan into an era of darkness and fear by creating an army of demonic ants that torment the city.


With gameplay that combines rhythm and action, you must master your reflexes and precision to face waves of enemies, and free Aiko from Haka's clutches.
Are you ready to restore peace to Japan?

Get ready for an adventure full of rhythm and action in RedDrop!
3073830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
